email.subject: Weekly Tech Digest: Top 10 AI Stories This Week
email.body:
Welcome to your weekly tech newsletter!

5. Meta open-sources new LLaMA variant

In other news:

- The future of quantum computing: a primer
- DevOps trends to watch in 2025
